messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-481 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-481" (or "reject BL-481 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Cut Operator Telegram reply latency: react out-of-cycle to a fresh inbound message instead of sleeping a full OPERATOR_INTERVAL_MS between ticks
What it solves: VERIFIED ROOT CAUSE (specifier, 2026-07-17 — against real code, not assumed):
  - operator_runtime.bb `-main` (line 1616-1619) runs `tick!` then UNCONDITIONALLY
    `(Thread/sleep interval-ms)` where `interval-ms` = OPERATOR_INTERVAL_MS (default 30000 = 30s,
    line 189). Each `tick!` reads pendin…
